debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ UniformContinuous f

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  -- Assume towards contradiction that f is not uniformly continuous.
  by_contra h
  -- Negate the definition of uniform continuity.
  rcases Metric.uniform_not_continuous_at h with ⟨ε₀, hε₀, x₀, hx₀⟩
  -- Extract a positive ε₀ from the negation.
  have hε₀_pos : 0 < ε₀ := by linarith
  -- Use the relatively dense property of ε₀/2-almost periods.
  have h₁ : IsRelDense {t | IsLinftyAP (ε₀ / 2) t f} := hf (ε₀ / 2) (by linarith)
  -- Obtain the length l such that the set of almost periods is relatively dense with respect to l.
  rcases h₁ with ⟨l, h₂⟩
  -- Use the fact that the set of almost periods is relatively dense with respect to l.
  have h₃ : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos h₂
  -- For x₀, find an almost period t₀ in [0, l).
  rcases h₂ x₀ with ⟨t₀, ⟨ht₀_left, ht₀_right⟩, ht₀⟩
  -- Use the almost period property to get a bound on f(x₀ + t₀) - f(x₀).
  have h₄ : ∀ x, ‖f (x + t₀) - f x‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := ht₀
  have h₅ : ‖f (x₀ + t₀) - f x₀‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := h₄ x₀
  -- Extract the continuity condition at x₀ for ε₀/2.
  have h₆ : ∃ δ, 0 < δ ∧ ∀ y, dist y x₀ < δ → dist (f y) (f x₀) < ε₀ / 2 := by
    have h₆₁ : ContinuousAt (f : ℝ → ℂ) x₀ := by
      -- Prove that f is continuous at x₀ using the uniform continuity contradiction.
      have h₆₂ : ContinuousAt (f : ℝ → ℂ) x₀ := by
        -- Use the fact that the negation of uniform continuity implies pointwise continuity.
        have h₆₃ : ContinuousAt (f : ℝ → ℂ) x₀ := by
          -- Use the fact that if f is not uniformly continuous, it is still continuous at each point.
          apply Metric.continuousAt_iff.mpr
          intro ε εpos
          -- Find δ for each ε.
          have h₆₄ := hx₀ ε εpos
          rcases h₆₄ with ⟨δ, hδpos, hδ⟩
          refine' ⟨δ, hδpos, _⟩
          intro y hy
          -- Use the definition of continuity.
          have h₆₅ := hδ y
          simp_all [Real.dist_eq, Complex.dist_eq, Complex.abs_def]
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try simp_all [Real.dist_eq, Complex.dist_eq, Complex.abs_def]) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              cases' le_total 0 (y - x₀) with h₆₆ h₆₆ <;>
              cases' le_total 0 (f y - f x₀) with h₆₇ h₆₇ <;>
              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, Real.dist_eq, Complex.dist_eq, Complex.abs_def] <;>
              nlinarith
            })
        exact h₆₃
      exact h₆₂
    -- Use the pointwise continuity to find δ.
    have h₆₅ : ContinuousAt (f : ℝ → ℂ) x₀ := h₆₁
    have h₆₆ : ∃ δ, 0 < δ ∧ ∀ y, dist y x₀ < δ → dist (f y) (f x₀) < ε₀ / 2 := by
      have h₆₇ : ContinuousAt (f : ℝ → ℂ) x₀ := h₆₁
      rw [Metric.continuousAt_iff] at h₆₇
      have h₆₈ := h₆₇ (ε₀ / 2) (by linarith)
      rcases h₆₈ with ⟨δ, hδpos, hδ⟩
      refine' ⟨δ, hδpos, _⟩
      intro y hy
      specialize hδ hy
      simp_all [Real.dist_eq, Complex.dist_eq, Complex.abs_def]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try simp_all [Real.dist_eq, Complex.dist_eq, Complex.abs_def]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          cases' le_total 0 (y - x₀) with h₆₉ h₆₉ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 (f y - f x₀) with h₇₀ h₇₀ <;>
          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, Real.dist_eq, Complex.dist_eq, Complex.abs_def] <;>
          nlinarith
        })
    exact h₆₆
  -- Obtain the δ from the continuity condition.
  rcases h₆ with ⟨δ, hδ_pos, hδ⟩
  -- Use the relatively dense property again to find a t₁ in [0, l).
  have h₇ : ∀ x, ∃ (t : ℝ), t ∈ Set.Ico 0 l ∧ x + t ∈ {t | IsLinftyAP (ε₀ / 2) t f} := by
    intro x
    have h₈ := h₂ x
    obtain ⟨t, ht, ht'⟩ := h₈
    refine' ⟨t, ht, _⟩
    exact ht'
  -- Find a suitable t₁.
  have h₈ := h₇ (x₀ + t₀)
  obtain ⟨t₁, ht₁, ht₁'⟩ := h₈
  -- Use the almost period property for t₁.
  have h₉ : ∀ x, ‖f (x + t₁) - f x‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := ht₁'
  -- Compute the distance between f(x₀ + t₀ + t₁) and f(x₀ + t₀).
  have h₁₀ : ‖f (x₀ + t₀ + t₁) - f (x₀ + t₀)‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := by
    have h₁₀₁ : ‖f ((x₀ + t₀) + t₁) - f (x₀ + t₀)‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := h₉ (x₀ + t₀)
    simpa [add_assoc] using h₁₀₁
  -- Compute the distance between f(x₀ + t₁) and f(x₀).
  have h₁₁ : ‖f (x₀ + t₁) - f x₀‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := by
    have h₁₁₁ : ‖f ((x₀) + t₁) - f (x₀)‖ ≤ ε₀ / 2 := h₉ x₀
    simpa [add_assoc] using h₁₁₁
  -- Choose a suitable point y to get a contradiction.
  have h₁₂ : ∃ y, dist y x₀ < δ ∧ dist (f (y + t₁)) (f (x₀ + t₁)) ≥ ε₀ / 2 := by
    -- Use the fact that f is not uniformly continuous.
    have h₁₃ := hx₀ (ε₀ / 2) (by linarith)
    obtain ⟨δ', hδ'_pos, hδ'⟩ := h₁₃
    -- Find points y and y' such that dist y y' < δ' but dist (f y) (f y') ≥ ε₀ / 2.
    have h₁₄ := hδ' δ' hδ'_pos
    obtain ⟨y, y', hy, hy'⟩ := h₁₄
    -- Choose y or y' based on which one is closer to x₀.
    by_cases h : dist y x₀ < dist y' x₀
    · -- Case: dist y x₀ < dist y' x₀.
      refine' ⟨y, _, _⟩
      · -- Prove dist y x₀ < δ.
        have h₁₅ : dist y x₀ < δ := by
          by_contra h₁₅
          have h₁₆ : dist y x₀ ≥ δ := by linarith
          have h₁₇ : dist y' x₀ > δ := by
            linarith [h]
          have h₁₈ : dist y y' < δ' := hy
          have h₁₉ : dist y' x₀ > δ := by linarith
          have h₂₀ : dist y x₀ ≥ δ := by linarith
          -- Use triangle inequality to get a contradiction.
          have h₂₁ : dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
            calc
              dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                -- Use the triangle inequality.
                have h₂₂ : dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                  calc
                    dist y' x₀ = dist y' x₀ := rfl
                    _ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                      -- Use the triangle inequality.
                      calc
                        dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                          -- Use the triangle inequality.
                          have h₂₃ : dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                            -- Use the triangle inequality.
                            calc
                              dist y' x₀ = dist y' x₀ := rfl
                              _ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                                -- Use the triangle inequality.
                                have h₂₄ : dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                                  -- Use the triangle inequality.
                                  calc
                                    dist y' x₀ = dist y' x₀ := rfl
                                    _ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                                      -- Use the triangle inequality.
                                      have h₂₅ : dist y' x₀ ≤ dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by
                                        -- Use the triangle inequality.
                                        exact dist_triangle y' y x₀
                                      linarith
                                linarith
                          linarith
                        _ = dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by rfl
                  <;> simp_all [Real.dist_eq]
                  <;> linarith
                linarith
              _ = dist y' y + dist y x₀ := by rfl
          have h₂₂ : dist y' y + dist y x₀ < δ' + dist y x₀ := by
            have h₂₃ : dist y' y < δ' := by
              -- Use the triangle inequality.
              have h₂₄ : dist y' y = dist y y' := by
                rw [dist_comm y' y]
              rw [h₂₄]
              linarith [hy]
            linarith
          have h₂₃ : δ' + dist y x₀ ≤ δ' + dist y x₀ := le_refl _
          have h₂₄ : dist y' x₀ < δ' + dist y x₀ := by linarith
          -- Use the fact that δ' + dist y x₀ > δ to get a contradiction.
          have h₂₅ : δ' + dist y x₀ > δ := by
            nlinarith [hδ'_pos]
          nlinarith [hδ'_pos]
        exact h₁₅
      · -- Prove dist (f (y + t₁)) (f (x₀ + t₁)) ≥ ε₀ / 2.
        have h₁₅ : dist (f (y + t₁)) (f (x₀ + t₁)) ≥ ε₀ / 2 := by
          by_contra h₁₅
          have h₁₆ : dist (f (y + t₁)) (f (x₀ + t₁)) < ε₀ / 2 := by linarith
          have h₁₇ : dist (f y) (f x₀) < ε₀ := by
            -- Use the triangle inequality to get a contradiction.
            have h₁₈ : dist (f y) (f x₀) ≤ dist (f y) (f (y + t₁)) + dist (f (y + t₁)) (f (x₀ + t₁)) + dist (f (x₀ + t₁)) (f x₀) := by
              calc
                dist (f y) (f x₀) ≤ dist (f y) (f (y + t₁)) + dist (f (y + t₁)) (f x₀) := by
                  -- Use the triangle inequality.
                  have h₁₉ : dist (f y) (f x₀) ≤ dist (f y) (f (y + t₁)) + dist (f (y + t₁)) (f x₀) := by
                    -- Use the triangle inequality.
                    calc
                      dist (f y) (f x₀)
